stemHtml: Which of the following statements regarding the cooling of hot brakes and wheel fires is correct?

options.a: Rapid cooling of a hot wheel may cause an explosive failure of the wheel.
options.b: After the deflation of tyres due to fusible plugs, only dry chemical agents can be used safely.
options.c: Carbon dioxide is the best extinguishing agent for brake fires.
options.d: Water fog must not be used to cool hot brakes.
